Description: Admin approval for HR email communication automation, allowing review and decision on classified emails.

inputs.name: EmployeeEmail
inputs.description: Email address of the employee related to the HR communication.

inputs.name: DetectedCategory
inputs.description: Automatically detected category of the HR email.

inputs.name: ClassificationStatus
inputs.description: Status of the email classification process.

inputs.name: ExtractedFields
inputs.description: Key fields and data extracted from the email content.

inputs.name: CategoryExplanation
inputs.description: Detailed explanation or reasoning for the detected category.

outputs.name: ReviewerComment
outputs.description: Optional comments provided by the reviewer regarding the HR email.

outcomes.name: Approve
outcomes.description: Approve the HR email communication for further processing.

outcomes.name: Reject
outcomes.description: Reject the HR email communication, indicating it should not be processed.

outcomes.name: ManualHandling
outcomes.description: Route the HR email communication for manual review and handling.

name: ActionSchema
